calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Doughas Hollowar, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation.
Declaration of Ernest Knowles in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Precision Performance Auto Body Repair, Inc. and David Long as follows:
Principal $23,810.38
Interest $913.52
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $442.50 for a total of $27,666.40
Plaintiff is entitled to its immediate possession of the leased equipments listed in the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
